nasb.text: However, the men rowed desperately to return to land but they could not, for the sea was becoming even stormier against them.

esv.text: Nevertheless, the men rowed hard to get back to dry land, but they could not, for the sea grew more and more tempestuous against them.

cnv.text: 那些人雖然破浪掙扎，要把船靠岸，卻是不能，因為海浪不斷洶湧撲來。

ccb.text: 然而船上的人还是拚命划船，希望把船划向岸边，可是没有成功，因为风浪实在太大了。

csbs.text: 然而，那些人还是拼命划桨要回到陆地，却是不能，因为海浪越来越汹涌，冲向他们。
